creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
They all use portaudio (audio/portaudio) in common.
On Linux and other UNIXs, the order in which sound servers are discovered varies.
The following bugs occur on FreeBSD.
https: //github.com /PortAudio/portaudio/issues/894
This can be avoided by not enabling sndio for portaudio.

Was it relevant?
